full_text:
Sima Liang (Ziyi) 司馬亮 (子翼)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Liang (司馬亮), styledZiyi (子翼). The first of the Princes associated with the Turmoil of the Eight Princes. Sima Liang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Sima Liang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
